2245320.name: EX_Holics.exe
2245320.description:
Delete all enemy players in abandoned cyber space!
You have gatling, beam cannon, misslies and more various weapons.
In somewhere, Voidcrack appear and gives you void powers.
Void modules and SP weapons let you more exciting battle.
If you go down for depth, void modules will be more dangerous.
new highspeed floating FPS Action has entered here now!

This is Base Package of this game.
with
9 weapons, 3 SP-pod, 5 Main-frames, and 1 Area.

Now, I'm providing only 5 modules with 7 tiers and random parameters.
However, I'm aiming for at least 100 types and work in progress.
and 10 modules will be Included in Base package.

I'm planning to sell various DLC such as Weapons, mechs, Modules and additional Areas.
I'm glad if i provide a new experience with improving perfection as a PvP game.
